description: Evaluation cases for OSPool HTCondor job scaffolding skill

evals.prompt: I have a Python simulation model and want to run a 100-combination parameter sweep on OSPool. Generate an HTCondor submit file.
evals.expected_output: HTCondor submit file, parameter sweep specification (CSV), and validation checklist
success_criteria: Submit file includes valid HTCondor directives (universe, executable, arguments)

evals.prompt: Submit a job to my local cluster
evals.expected_output: Skill does not activate; OSPool/HTCondor scaffolder is specific to distributed HTC, not local cluster jobs

evals.prompt: I'm running a large sensitivity analysis with 50 agents × 10 patches × 5 random seeds on OSG. Generate HTCondor configuration.
evals.expected_output: HTCondor submit file with job parameters, DAG file for job coordination (if applicable)
success_criteria: Output includes checkpoint/restart guidance for long simulations

evals.prompt: My model has large input files (100 MB each). Set up HTCondor with proper file staging.
evals.expected_output: Submit file with input/output staging directives; guidance on data cache or HTTP access
success_criteria: Output warns about file size and suggests HTTP staging or OSPool data cache
Input/output paths use relative references, not absolute paths

evals.prompt: Generate a Slurm batch script for my HPC cluster
evals.expected_output: Skill does not activate; hpc is responsible for Slurm. This skill handles OSPool/HTCondor only.
